description_long: This is a two-story rectangular house with a modern, minimalist design, featuring a flat roof and a grid-like structural frame. The exterior walls are primarily composed of exposed orange-brown brickwork, interspersed with large rectangular window and door openings, some of which are framed by black structural elements. The house has a clear, repetitive pattern of windows and doors on both levels, with the upper story featuring more open sections and horizontal slats, possibly for ventilation or balcony railings. The interior is visible through the open windows and doors, revealing partitioned rooms and a striped floor pattern. The structure sits on a slightly raised black base, giving it a defined footprint. The overall appearance is geometric and functional, with an emphasis on straight lines and right angles.
description: A modern, two-story rectangular house with exposed brick walls, large window and door openings, and a flat roof, framed by black structural elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing a symmetrical arrangement of windows and doors, with prominent brickwork and black framing.
description_view_1: Side view with fewer window openings, mostly solid black framing and brick, and less visible interior detail.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with a similar grid of windows and doors, and extensive brick and black frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with minimal window openings and a focus on the solid wall structure.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple rectangular entryway with no porch or decorative elements, framed by black structural elements and flush with the facade.
